negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_005
prompt: A close-up shot captures the meticulous process of sewing, focusing on the needle and presser foot of a sewing machine stitching through a light green fabric with subtle horizontal stripes. Two hands, one on each side, hold the fabric taut, ensuring precise alignment under the needle. The metallic components of the sewing machine, including the needle and presser foot, are prominently visible, with the needle moving rhythmically up and down. The bright lighting highlights the texture of the fabric and the sewing process. The hands adjust the fabric slightly as the machine sews, maintaining a steady pace. As the video progresses, the fabric gradually accumulates stitches, and the hands continue to guide it smoothly under the needle. By the final frame, the fabric shows a noticeable length of stitched lines, indicating the ongoing sewing activity.
